chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3950 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.14949/2025 3. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Danish Nayyar, advocate for the petitioner Messrs. Abdullah Munshi and Shajee Siddiqui, advocates for respondent Ms. Bushra Salahuddin, advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Naeem Akhtar Talpur, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for the petitioner the petition is pressed to the extent that the Cantonment Board Faisal be pleased to address the objections filed, as available at page 157 of the court file. Learned counsel seeks that these objections be decided vide a speaking order after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
